mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xeus.crms_rqst_renew ( mgr_seq, avi_mgr_seq, rqst_mgr_seq, file_seq, renew_typ, reqst_dat, reqst_resn, acpt_dat, acpt_user_id, acpt_yn, rejt_resn, play_limit_cnt, play_limit_dat ) VALUES ( (SELECT (COALESCE(max(mgr_seq), 0)+1) AS mgr_seq FROM xeus.crms_rqst_renew) , #{aviMgrSeq}::numeric, #{rqstMgrSeq}::numeric, #{fileSeq}::numeric, #{renewTyp}, #{reqstDat}, #{reqstResn}, #{acptDat}, #{acptUserId}, #{acptYn}, #{rejtResn}, #{playLimitCnt}::numeric, #{playLimitDat} )
